rawAssistant: A strong party is one that balances its members' strengths and weaknesses, allowing each to shine in their respective roles on the battlefield. Formations matter – a mix of melee and ranged attackers keeps opponents guessing. Discipline and clear communication are key; when you know your teammates' moves, you can anticipate theirs better. Let's take a look at this party: Thornbeast and Gremlin make an interesting combination. How do they work together?
